$comment: REVIEWED mapping of designsystem.gov.ae docs pages to package class-roots. First derived mechanically from class-usage evidence in inventory/docs.json (aegovClassesInExamples, per-block root frequency), then reviewed by hand. build-catalog.mjs validates every mapping against the evidence and fails on contradiction. Regenerate the evidence with: node scripts/fetch-docs.mjs && node scripts/extract-docs.mjs. Evidence snapshot: retrievedOn 2026-07-07.

navigation.note: No dedicated package class-root; the docs 'Navigation' is a composition of Tailwind utilities (side-nav examples add aegov-tooltip). Kept as a docs-only component artifact.

slider.note: No package slider/carousel component; the docs 'Slider' composes aegov-card/aegov-link with a slick-carousel integration and references unshipped aegov-slider-next/prev hooks. Kept as a docs-only component artifact.

taxonomyNotes.aegov-check: Docs document 'Checkbox' and 'Radio' as separate components; both are styled by the aegov-check root (aegov-check-group / aegov-check-item).
taxonomyNotes.aegov-form: Docs 'Input', 'Select', 'Textarea' and 'Range slider' are separate pages all styled by aegov-form-control under this root; the file-input docs also wrap their control in it.
taxonomyNotes.aegov-header: Documented as the 'Header' BLOCK on designsystem.gov.ae, but its styles ship in the package — refines the earlier 'blocks do not ship as code' finding: markup is docs-only, styling is package-tier.
taxonomyNotes.aegov-footer: Documented as the 'Footer' BLOCK on designsystem.gov.ae, but its styles ship in the package — markup is docs-only, styling is package-tier.
taxonomyNotes.aegov-hero: Documented as the 'Hero' BLOCK on designsystem.gov.ae, but its styles ship in the package — markup is docs-only, styling is package-tier.
taxonomyNotes.aegov-mobile: Support root (mobile accordion variant); used inside the header and footer block examples, no dedicated docs page.
taxonomyNotes.aegov-backdrop: Overlay primitive shared with modal; no dedicated docs page.

knownDocsOnlyClasses.aegov-newslette: Typo in the docs newsletter block example (class="aegov-newslette ..."); neither it nor a corrected 'aegov-newsletter' ships in @aegov/design-system 3.0.7.
knownDocsOnlyClasses.aegov-pagination-larger: Used by docs pagination examples (responsive page-number visibility); not defined in 3.0.7 compiled CSS.
knownDocsOnlyClasses.aegov-pagination-smaller: Used by docs pagination examples (responsive page-number visibility); not defined in 3.0.7 compiled CSS.
knownDocsOnlyClasses.aegov-slider-next: Carousel control hook in the docs hero block example (slick-slider integration); not defined in 3.0.7 compiled CSS.
knownDocsOnlyClasses.aegov-slider-prev: Carousel control hook in the docs hero block example (slick-slider integration); not defined in 3.0.7 compiled CSS.
